parameters.subject: Your Utopia Deli Secure Payment Link
parameters.html:
={{ '

The Utopia Deli

It’s just good food

Order Confirmation

Hi ' + $json.body.customer.name + ',

We received your order! Here are the details:

' + $json.body.items.map(item => '
' + item.name + ' x' + item.qty + ' $' + (item.total_price_cents / 100).toFixed(2) + '
').join('') + '
Subtotal $' + ($json.body.subtotal_cents / 100).toFixed(2) + '
Tax $' + ($json.body.tax_cents / 100).toFixed(2) + '
Total $' + ($json.body.frontend_total_cents / 100).toFixed(2) + '

Complete your payment:

Pay Now

Pickup time: ' + ($json.body.customer.pickup_time || 'ASAP') + '

Questions? Call us at (501) 551-5944

' }}
